underlying_goal: Learning Neovim keybindings and configuring their Neovim setup with appropriate key mappings for Telescope, NeoTree, and leader key
friction_detail: User encountered errors from an incomplete NeoTree keybinding line and a typo ('revealt' instead of 'reveal/toggle') in their config.
brief_summary: User explored Neovim keybinding options and configured their leader key and NeoTree/Telescope mappings, receiving clear explanations and debugging help along the way.
